headline: Coca-Cola Stock Posts Biggest Gain Since 2020. Why Earnings Are Exciting Investors.
summary: Coca-Cola shares have fallen in recent months due to consumer fatigue from price increases and a shift to zero-sugar drinks.

headline: The Genius Of McDonald’s
summary: Aside from its performance as the largest fast-food company in America, McDonald’s (NYSE MCD) has a genius for marketing and managing its menu. Among its packing options is its under-$3 menu, aimed, at least in part, at people who could not normally afford to eat out. It captures this group in a way that few ... The Genius Of McDonald’s

headline: Starbucks vs. McDonald’s: One Fast Food Dividend Has Quietly Become a Retirement Staple
summary: Starbucks (NASDAQ: SBUX) and McDonald’s (NYSE: MCD) just delivered earnings that pulled their stories in opposite directions. McDonald’s posted 5.7% global comparable sales and a clean beat. Starbucks topped revenue but missed on profit as its turnaround spending continues. For income investors, the contrast between a steady Golden Arches payout and a coffee chain rebuilding ... Starbucks vs. McDonald’s: One Fast Food Dividend Has Quietly Become a Retirement Staple

headline: McDonald's is the latest fast food chain to offer fancier drinks
summary: Fast food chains, thirsty for new ways to grow, are amping up their beverage offerings.  McDonald’s said Tuesday it will launch six crafted beverages in U.S. restaurants on May 6.  It’s joining other chains, like KFC, Wendy’s and Taco Bell, that have elevated their drinks in order to lure customers away from rivals like Starbucks and Dutch Bros.

headline: Subway enters value wars with menu priced under $5
summary: The sandwich chain’s Fresh Value Menu offers 15 items and joins McDonald’s and Taco Bell in targeting specific pricing to drive traffic and improve affordability.
